playerContract.fantasy: Tune a suspended cathedral mobile until three weighted bowls sing in exact balance.
playerContract.heroVerb: shift and settle a physical counterweight
playerContract.qualityBar: Preserve the diagnostics-closed loop, deterministic endpoint state, validated feel scores, and one Canvas/DOM owner.
requiredProof: enter and understand with Advanced closed
zero console messages and bounded runtime metrics

bridgeSearch.result: No matching bridge responsibility or export exists at the pinned Core commit.

protokits.bridgeSearchResult: No package export, source implementation, status-matrix row, ProtoKit-map row, candidate-promotion entry, or catalog entry owns physics-body-to-weight-source projection.
protokits.atlasCoverageNote: The two implemented endpoint wrappers are package-exported but absent from the current kit-status matrix and ProtoKit map; this consolidation records the gap and does not infer promotion readiness.

consolidatedBoundary.domainMeaning: Translate one authoritative Physics Body Lite snapshot into one idempotent Weighted Trigger source upsert after a host has chosen to invoke the command.

input.tags: optional JSON-compatible string array; defaults to []

source.position: a clone of the authoritative body position

lifecycle.events: none; Weighted Trigger emits facts after its normal resolution tick
lifecycle.scheduling: none; the host or existing Core lifecycle calls engine.tick

invariants: the source id equals the authoritative body id
position and mass come from the same canonical body snapshot
repeated projection replaces rather than duplicates the same source id
a missing or absent body id returns an explicit rejected result without manufacturing state
the command never decides whether a body is settled

owns: normalize caller tags and disabled state
return one serializable accepted or rejected command result
doesNotOwn: body registration, position, velocity, mass, friction, collision, or lifecycle
trigger registration, bounds, source storage, aggregation, activation, events, descriptors, or lifecycle
application outcomes, restart, authored content, tuning, or player policy
browser input, DOM, Canvas, renderer, camera, audio, VFX, diagnostics, telemetry, or evidence capture

current.evidence: syncStone and settle both read the canonical body and upsert the same-id weighted source before an explicit host tick.

plausible.distinctPolicy: projects eligible grounded bodies, while the host owns contact eligibility and door or hazard outcomes
plausible.evidence: Weighted Trigger explicitly owns plate facts and Physics Body Lite exposes renderer-agnostic body snapshots.

plausible.distinctPolicy: projects loaded bodies, while the host owns cargo attachment and capacity consequences
plausible.evidence: The command depends only on stable body id, position, and mass rather than Counterweight Cathedral content.

plausible.distinctPolicy: projects bodies placed on pans, while the host owns comparison and completion policy
plausible.evidence: Weighted Trigger metadata names counterweight and balance-system consumers independently of this route.

consumerEvidence.acceptanceDecision: Consumer evidence is sufficient to freeze the boundary but does not count as implementation, downstream adoption, or a newly accepted capability.

blockers: the reusable command is not implemented
the Counterweight Cathedral consumer is not migrated
reference cleanup and deterministic/playable/performance parity have not run against a successor
no retirement record or recovery path exists

currentRunParity.timingAssessment: Against the authoritative 16.594 ms / 60.26 FPS / 17.7 ms p95 baseline, the fresh active window changed -0.193% / +0.199% / +5.650%. The primary average-frame metric improved, all values remained inside budget, and byte-identical runtime files mean change-induced regression is 0%.

offendingRegions: upper-left hero objective and permanent control card
worldFirstGate.smallestNextPresentationEdit: In an authorized presentation-debt stage, remove the persistent right-side stone cards and bottom status/bowl strips, keep selection and weight facts on the stones and bowls, then replay before addressing the hero and ending cards.
worldFirstGate.publicationConsequence: This structural consolidation does not claim presentation completion and cannot authorize another player-visible feature or derived experiment.

unresolvedGaps: The contract-frozen integration behavior has not been implemented or package-exported from ProtoKits.
The current ProtoKits status matrix, ProtoKit map, promotion ledger, and DSM catalog do not enumerate the endpoint family or candidate.
No consumer migration or successor parity is authorized yet.
The preserved playable remains the parity owner and is not purge-eligible.
Pre-existing active-play overlay cards remain visual debt and must be resolved before another player-visible feature or derived experiment.
nextStageEntryGate: Use this consolidation export as the sole intake.
In NexusEngine-ProtoKits, implement only the frozen projectPhysicsBody command and package export behind physics-body-weight-source-projection-kit.
Advance exactly one semantic layer from implementation to behavior; do not broaden to kit, subdomain, domain, or cross-domain promotion.
Preserve the exact capability requirements, provided token, engine namespace, serializable command results, and zero-state/event/system/descriptor contract.
Do not migrate Counterweight Cathedral, remove syncStone or settle, call engine.tick inside the command, resolve presentation debt, purge sources, or derive a new experiment.
